scripts.build: npm run build --prefix coptic-antonios-unicode && npm run build --prefix coptic-pronounce
scripts.pack:check: npm run pack:check --prefix coptic-antonios-unicode && npm run pack:check --prefix coptic-pronounce
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run publish:dry-run --prefix coptic-antonios-unicode && npm run publish:dry-run --prefix coptic-pronounce
scripts.publish:npm: npm run publish:npm --prefix coptic-antonios-unicode && npm run publish:npm --prefix coptic-pronounce
